title: Mount Charge Damage
description: Mounts deal damage when running into mobs.
body:
![Mount Charge Damage - Horses hurt!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ba17d5701d7590e513929b9e71d4012c4ca48ce.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V4PgfGQSE_4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Horses, donkeys, mules, camels, nautiluses, etc. trample mobs by running into them, Mount & Blade-style.

Everything is configurable, such as:

- Targetting type: Monsters only, All mobs.
- Various damage variables & multipliers.
- Mount attributes & armor value contribution to damage.
- Speed & falling thresholds in order to deal damage.
- Which mounts are allowed to deal charge damage (Ex. 'minecraft:horse', 'custom:dragon').
- Mount-specific damage multipliers.
- How frequent to deal damage or check collisions.
- Mount collision box size while running or falling.
- Horizontal/vertical push intensity when damaging mobs.
- Whether to show death messages caused by charge damage.
- Explore the configs & adjust to best suit you.

Please let me know about any bugs or if you have any suggestions or comments, thank you.

v0.02
